# Colorado Environmental Data Hub

This sidebar is a flat, text-labeled list of the wiki's main pages, kept simple on purpose so it stays readable with a screen reader and navigable by keyboard. Each entry is a plain text link with no nested menus or icon-only controls.

- [Home](Home)
- [How we track work](Home#how-we-track-work)

- [Data dictionary](https://github.com/CUPIDS-Lab/co-environmental-data/blob/main/DATA-DICTIONARY.md)
- [Project management](https://github.com/CUPIDS-Lab/co-environmental-data/blob/main/PROJECT-MANAGEMENT.md)
